hero.title: React Native & Full Stack Developer
hero.subtitle: Building scalable web and mobile applications with React, Expo, Next.js and TypeScript.
hero.description: Full Stack Developer with 5+ years of experience building production-ready web and mobile products for startups, agencies, and companies across different industries.

about.title: About Me
descriptions: Full Stack Developer with 5+ years of experience building web and mobile applications using React, Next.js, React Native, Expo, Node.js, and TypeScript.

Throughout my career, I've worked with startups, agencies, and product teams, developing scalable applications, mobile experiences, back-office platforms, and SaaS products across different industries.

I enjoy working across the full product lifecycle, from planning and architecture to development, deployment, and continuous improvement. My experience includes building modern web applications, mobile apps, CMS-driven platforms, third-party integrations, and AI-powered features.

experiences.title: Dam Squad
descriptions: I'm part of the Dam Squad IT team alongside the CTO, building and maintaining custom solutions for ongoing clients

At Amparo Seguros I manage all their digital products: the sales team mobile app (React Native) for policy requests and sales management, the platform backend, and the internal certificate issuance app.
At Red SOS I handle the development and maintenance of their websites and landing pages.

experiences.title: Capsule Codes
descriptions: I build web and mobile applications from scratch for clients across different countries.

I'm currently working on UR POV, a mobile reviews and business listings app for the South African market, on an educational platform focused on investing and personal finance, and on the company's own SaaS product — a project management platform for development agencies featuring time tracking, invoicing, and Kanban-style ticket management.

experiences.title: Helmcode
descriptions: I worked on three products within the Helmcode ecosystem. I developed Andulia, an AI agent that connects to AWS and Kubernetes credentials to manage cloud infrastructure through natural language.
I contributed to HelmCloud, a container-based cloud platform for SMBs and startups that reduces infrastructure costs by up to 70% compared to traditional clouds.

I also worked on Coderun, a SaaS for deploying and managing containerized services with GitHub, GitLab integration and Dockerfile support — no complex configuration needed. I also built the company's institutional website.

experiences.title: Potentiality Group
descriptions: I worked as staff augmentation assigned to the IT teams of Iúnigo and San Cristóbal Seguros.

At Iúnigo I developed and maintained the policyholder self-service mobile app — featuring policy status, roadside assistance, claims reporting, benefits, and installment payments integrated with Mercado Pago — as well as the main website with its online car insurance quoting tool and a surety bond platform for home insurance.

At San Cristóbal Seguros I was part of the Marketing IT team, where we developed and maintained the multi-product online quoting platform, the insurance broker portal with its self-management system (sales, commissions, and analytics), and the rollout of all these systems for the Uruguayan market.

experiences.title: Vippin
descriptions: I developed the institutional website for Clínica Universitaria Reina Fabiola from scratch.
I built a proxy API between Salesforce and the frontend for a Telefónica España client.

I also worked on a tourism app for the Ministry of Tourism of Villa Carlos Paz, Córdoba, featuring Google Maps integration and Beacon technology for real-time geolocation of tourist points of interest.

items.title: Invoice App
items.description: A simple invoice generator for freelancers, built with Next.js, TypeScript and PDF generation. Includes local invoice history and multilingual support.

items.title: Amparo Seguros
items.description: Digital insurance ecosystem including a React Native mobile app for agents, backend services, and internal tools for certificate issuance and business operations.

items.title: Helmcode / Cloud Products
items.description: Contributed to AI-powered cloud infrastructure tools, container-based platforms and SaaS products for deploying and managing services.

projects.title: Clínica Universitaria Reina Fabiola
projects.description: Institutional website for Clínica Universitaria Reina Fabiola, with a responsive design and a focus on the patient experience.

projects.title: Iúnigo Website
projects.description: Development and maintenance of Iúnigo's main website and its online quote tool for a leading insurance company in Argentina, focused on delivering an excellent user experience.

projects.title: San Cristóbal Seguros
projects.description: Development and maintenance of the online quote tool and the agents' portal for Argentina and Uruguay.

projects.title: Estudialo AI
projects.description: Fullstack platform for students and teachers with a Google Gemini integration that automatically generates exams, summaries, slides, and study materials from any content.

projects.title: Red SOS
projects.description: Development of Red SOS's institutional website, a company providing medical assistance and emergency services in Argentina.

contact.title: Interested in working together?
contact.text: I'm open to remote opportunities focused on React Native, Expo, Next.js and Full Stack JavaScript development.
